system.powerDescription:
Target a point in range, you summon from the sky a clump of dirt, stone, and minerals that encompasses an area of up to CAT that begins to rapidly plummet towards the target. If it is targeted inside a building the meteor will attempt to smash through any barriers in the way. When you use this power roll PSYCHE and answering the following questions, gaining +1D for each 'yes' answer and only spending a psyche burst on success. Afterwards, the meteor remains where it fell. 

• Is there nothing between the meteor and its target? 

• Is the target unable to move out of the way?
